stories.title: Implement core functionality
stories.description: As a user, I want to X so that Y
steps: Implement service layer with repository pattern
Create tRPC router with proper procedures
Build UI components following design system
Add form validation with Zod schemas

definition_of_done.item: Code complete and compiles without errors (pnpm build passes)
Unit tests written and passing (>80% coverage)
No TypeScript errors in changed files (tsc --noEmit passes)

acceptance_criteria.item: Uses createRouterWithActor pattern for tRPC router
Follows repository pattern for data access
Uses design system components (no custom styling)
Proper error handling with user feedback

stories.title: Handle edge cases and error states
stories.description: Ensure the feature handles all edge cases gracefully
steps: Design empty state UI with call-to-action
Implement retry logic for failed requests

definition_of_done.item: Code complete and compiles without errors (pnpm build passes)
Edge case unit tests written and passing
No TypeScript errors in changed files (tsc --noEmit passes)

acceptance_criteria.item: Uses standard error boundary pattern from design system
Loading states use skeleton components (not spinners)
Empty states follow design system patterns
Error messages are user-friendly (no technical jargon)
Errors are logged to telemetry via SDK
